title: Word Loom
description: A falling-grid word puzzle. Letters cascade onto a 5×5 board; you swipe adjacent tiles (8 directions) to spell words — then gravity pulls what's left back into play. Built with Godot 4, targets iPad, phone, and browser. The mechanic is called Word Drop — part Tetris, part Boggle, part chess-level combo thinking. English and Spanish word lists. Light/dark themes. Available on Vercel (HTML5). Built as a mother's day gift.

title: Slopapotamous Rex
description: Art collective embracing AI as production tool, not cultural threat. The tool doesn't determine artistic merit; the directing mind does. Making effective art for the attention economy.

title: Bin Juice Saga
description: Jax Karu (gonzo raccoon) and Seagull Breakwater (gutter poet) lead a crew of scavengers through Austin’s dumpsters—where garbage is currency and meaning is always contested.
